scripts.upload-parser: bunx wrangler r2 object put public/editor/cssParser.browser.js --file=dist/cssParser.browser.js --remote
scripts.upload-source-map: bunx wrangler r2 object put public/editor/cssParser.browser.js.map --file=dist/cssParser.browser.js.map --remote
scripts.deploy: bun run upload-parser && bun run upload-source-map
